zh.lifeSummary: 當William Drury於大約1524年出生在英國素福爾可盧加姆時，他的父親John Drury46歲，母親Elizabeth Goldingham16歲。他於大約1568年與Mary Southwell在英國英格蘭素福爾可盧加姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1589年5月7日享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦藍白斯聖 瑪麗 馮 雷斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Drury于大约1524年出生在英国素福爾可盧加姆时，他的父亲John Drury46岁，母亲Elizabeth Goldingham16岁。他于大约1568年与Mary Southwell在英国英格兰素福爾可盧加姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1589年5月7日享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦藍白斯聖 瑪麗 馮 雷斯。

nameMeanings.name: Drury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When William Drury was born about 1524, in Rougham, Suffolk, England, his father, John Drury, was 46 and his mother, Elizabeth Goldingham, was 16. He married Mary Southwell about 1568, in Rougham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 7 May 1589, at the age of 66, and was buried in St Mary the Less, Lambeth, London, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Mary Southwell environ 1568, à Rougham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 7 mai 1589, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à St Mary the Less, Lambeth, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Druryが約1524年にイギリススフォルクロウアムで生まれた時，父John Druryは46歳，母Elizabeth Goldinghamは16歳であった。約1568年にイギリスイギリススフォルクロウアムでMary Southwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1589年5月7日に66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンランベススト マリー ス レスにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Mary Magdalen, Old Fish Street, Lond: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 램스 스트 메리 테 레스
ko.lifeSummary: William Drury(이)가 대략 1524년 영국 수폴크 루그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Drury(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Goldingham(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1568년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 루그함에서 Mary Southwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1589년 5월 7일 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 램스 스트 메리 테 레스에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Drury родился около 1524 г. в местности роугам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Drury было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Goldingham, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Southwell около 1568 г. в местности роугам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 7 мая 1589 г. в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри т лесс, лэмбет, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
